---
title: "README"
author: "Zachary McCaw"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: 
  html_document: 
    keep_md: TRUE
---

[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/zmccaw/LFDR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/zmccaw/LFDR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

# LFDR: Local False Discovery Rate Estimation

Utilities for estimating the local false discovery rate. See the vignette below for a walkthrough.

# Package Vignette

```{r, child='vignettes/LFDR.Rmd', cache=FALSE}
```
